title: VWNAO
description: Have you ever wondered what would happen if you combined multiplayer, optimization and quality of life mods? Try VWNAO to find out!
body:
ABANDONED
---
Choose your language below to see the description

English


VWNAO


Vanilla was never an option


## ❔ **About** **"Vanilla was never an option" (VWNAO)** is meant to be a complete but simple modpack, whether for your two weeks Minecraft addiction or just your everyday usage. It consists of dozens of small QoL & optimization mods combined all together to optimise your gameplay and make it more enjoyable, comfortable to use. I initially made this modpack for some friends but as they seemed to like it, I've decided to release it here so that everyone can enjoy it! ## ➕ **Features**
| | VWNAO¹ | Minecraft vanilla | |-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------|-------------------| | Account protection (through [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)) | ✅ | ❌ | | Fps² | 753 | 200 | | Game boot time | 22s | 15s | | Optifine parity³ | ✅ | ❌ | | Play easily with your friends (thanks to [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)) | ✅ | ❌ | | Visual enhancements (GUIs, in-game, etc...) | ✅ | ❌ |
¹ Stats are relevant only for the latest version. ² Average fps after chunks and mods have loaded when joining a world / server. ³ The vast majority of Optifine's features will work on VWNAO. This includes but is not limited to custom texture packs, shaders, dynamic environnement, zoom, capes, etc. ##
If you want to check out which mods are included in this modpack you can go to `Versions` at the top of this page and select any version, then scroll down to see the dependencies (mods) used. Alternatively, you can see them in the list below.
List of used mods ⯇

• Sound Physics Remastered • EMI • ViaFabricPlus • Jade • Simple Voice Chat • Presence Footsteps • Iris Shaders • Mod Menu • Quilted Fabric API • Indium • Essential • Falling Leaves • Blur • Sodium • No Chat Reports • Lithium • FerriteCore • LambDynamicLights • Memory Leak Fix • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine • FastLoad • Starlight • Reese's Sodium Options • Sodium Extra • Visuality
• Cloth Config API • Smooth Boot • Chat Heads • ExtraSounds • Immersive Portals • AmbientSounds
• CreativeCore • Terralith • Fabric Seasons • OstOverhaul • AppleSkin

## ❓**FAQ** > **Q:** Is there a big performance gap compared to other optimization modpacks? > > **A:** Short answer, no. You may have a different experience depending on your hardware, but overall it should be unnoticeable.
> **Q:** What modloader / version should I use? > > **A:** This modpack is configured to be used with both [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/en) and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) modding toolchains. As for the versions, the latest release (not including snapshots and pre-releases) will always be the one supported.
> **Q:** How would I play with my friends using [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)? > > **A:** First, create a new world in singleplayer and go to the pause menu (press escape on your keyboard). Then, click `Open to LAN` and you will see a public domain alongside the local port. For others to connect to your LAN server, simply give them your public domain and then can join you as they would join any server!
